infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Volt uses the camera to scan barcodes, capture photos, model numbers, serial numbers, and other text for the paired Chrome extension.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Volt uses the microphone for hold-to-speak dictation into the paired Chrome browser.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Volt may request photo library access if an imported image is used for scanning product codes, model numbers, serial numbers, or other text for the paired Chrome extension.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Volt uses speech recognition to turn dictated speech into text for the paired Chrome browser.

plugins.cameraPermission: Volt uses the camera to scan barcodes, capture photos, model numbers, serial numbers, and other text for the paired Chrome extension.

plugins.microphonePermission: Volt uses the microphone for hold-to-speak dictation into the paired Chrome browser.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Volt uses speech recognition to turn dictated speech into text for the paired Chrome browser.
